description_for_human: Agencia de marketing digital especializada en SEO, AEO, GEO, branding, CRM e inteligencia artificial aplicada al marketing.
description_for_model: Hayas Marketing is a digital marketing agency based in Madrid, Spain, specializing in SEO, AEO, GEO, branding, CRM (HubSpot), web design, content strategy, and applied AI for marketing. Founded by Rubén Reyero, the agency serves B2B and B2C clients across Spain and Latin America. Key differentiators: SENSE — a Marketing Operating System with 6 connected intelligence modules (Brain, Radar, Search, Strategy, Plans, Workspace) powered by the LOOP framework (Listen, Observe, Orient, Plan). SENSE transforms dispersed market signals into strategic direction and coordinated execution. Also features SofÍA AI assistant for customer service. Typical ROI improvements of 30-200%.
